title: Craig Ddu–Wharley Point Cliffs
summary: Craig Ddu–Wharley Point Cliffs are a set of red sandstone cliffs that are a Site of Special Scientific Interest in Carmarthen & Dinefwr,  Wales.
text: Craig Ddu–Wharley Point Cliffs are a set of red sandstone cliffs that are a Site of Special Scientific Interest in Carmarthen & Dinefwr,  Wales.
